requirement_topic.en: Egyptian Appliance Energy-Efficiency Label for Lighting Products vs CN Energy Label
requirement_topic.zh: 埃及照明产品家电能效标签 vs 中国能效标识
requirement_topic.zht: 埃及照明產品家電能效標籤 vs 中國能效標識

summary.en: Egypt operates a mandatory appliance energy-efficiency labelling scheme for energy-using products, administered by EOS together with the Egyptian Energy Efficiency programme. Lighting products covered by the relevant ES energy-label standard must carry the Egyptian energy-efficiency label showing the product's efficiency class. The label and the underlying minimum energy performance are defined by Egyptian ES standards which adopt the relevant IEC/ISO measurement methods for LED lamp and luminaire luminous efficacy (lm/W). Importers must obtain the label classification for covered lighting products as part of clearance and retail placement. Exact scope, classes, and efficacy thresholds for LED luminaires must be verified against the current EOS energy-label standard in force.
summary.zh: 埃及对用电产品实行强制性家电能效标签制度，由 EOS 与埃及能效计划共同管理。被相关 ES 能效标签标准覆盖的照明产品须贴附标明产品能效等级的埃及能效标签。标签及其依据的最低能效由埃及 ES 标准定义，这些标准采纳相关 IEC/ISO 的 LED 灯及灯具光效（lm/W）测量方法。进口商须为被覆盖的照明产品取得标签等级，作为清关和零售投放的一部分。LED 灯具的确切适用范围、等级及光效阈值须对照现行有效的 EOS 能效标签标准核实。
summary.zht: 埃及對用電產品實行強制性家電能效標籤制度，由 EOS 與埃及能效計劃共同管理。被相關 ES 能效標籤標準覆蓋的照明產品須貼附標明產品能效等級的埃及能效標籤。標籤及其依據的最低能效由埃及 ES 標準定義，這些標準採納相關 IEC/ISO 的 LED 燈及燈具光效（lm/W）測量方法。進口商須為被覆蓋的照明產品取得標籤等級，作為清關和零售投放的一部分。LED 燈具的確切適用範圍、等級及光效閾值須對照現行有效的 EOS 能效標籤標準核實。

standards_or_laws: Egyptian appliance energy-efficiency labelling scheme (EOS / Egyptian Energy Efficiency programme) — mandatory energy label for covered lighting products
EOS ES energy-label standard for lamps/luminaires — adopts IEC/ISO luminous-efficacy measurement methods (verify current ES number in force)

summary.en: China operates the China Energy Label (CEL / 中国能效标识) under the Energy Conservation Law and the Administrative Measures for Energy Efficiency Labelling. For LED products, the minimum energy performance and efficiency grades are set by GB 30255 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED lamps for general lighting service) and the implementation rules for the China Energy Label. Covered LED lamps must display the colour-graded China Energy Label and be registered in the CEL filing system. The grade boundaries, test methods, and label format are China-specific and are not interchangeable with the Egyptian energy label.
summary.zh: 中国依据《节约能源法》及《能源效率标识管理办法》实行中国能效标识（CEL）。对于 LED 产品，最低能效与能效等级由 GB 30255（普通照明用 LED 灯能效限定值及能效等级）及中国能效标识实施细则规定。被覆盖的 LED 灯须展示分色等级的中国能效标识，并在 CEL 备案系统注册。等级界限、测试方法及标签格式为中国特有，与埃及能效标签不可互换。
summary.zht: 中國依據《節約能源法》及《能源效率標識管理辦法》實行中國能效標識（CEL）。對於 LED 產品，最低能效與能效等級由 GB 30255（普通照明用 LED 燈能效限定值及能效等級）及中國能效標識實施細則規定。被覆蓋的 LED 燈須展示分色等級的中國能效標識，並在 CEL 備案系統注冊。等級界限、測試方法及標籤格式為中國特有，與埃及能效標籤不可互換。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED lamps for general lighting service (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) — Administrative Measures for Energy Efficiency Labelling (CEL filing/registration required)

gap.en: Both markets require a national energy-efficiency label, but the schemes are separate and non-interchangeable. A Chinese LED product registered with the China Energy Label under GB 30255 is not recognised in Egypt — the manufacturer/importer must obtain the Egyptian energy-label classification under the applicable EOS ES energy-label standard and apply the Egyptian label format. Test reports must be acceptable to EOS (typically IEC/ISO efficacy methods); the China Energy Label grade and the Egyptian efficiency class are derived differently and cannot be directly transposed. Confirm whether the specific luminaire type falls in the covered scope of the current Egyptian energy-label standard, and which laboratory test reports EOS will accept.
gap.zh: 两个市场都要求国家能效标签，但制度独立且不可互换。依据 GB 30255 在中国能效标识注册的中国 LED 产品在埃及不被认可——制造商/进口商须依据适用的 EOS ES 能效标签标准取得埃及能效标签等级并贴附埃及标签格式。检测报告须为 EOS 所接受（通常为 IEC/ISO 光效方法）；中国能效标识等级与埃及能效等级的推导方式不同，无法直接转换。请确认具体灯具类型是否落入现行埃及能效标签标准的覆盖范围，以及 EOS 接受哪些实验室检测报告。
gap.zht: 兩個市場都要求國家能效標籤，但制度獨立且不可互換。依據 GB 30255 在中國能效標識注冊的中國 LED 產品在埃及不被認可——製造商/進口商須依據適用的 EOS ES 能效標籤標準取得埃及能效標籤等級並貼附埃及標籤格式。檢測報告須為 EOS 所接受（通常為 IEC/ISO 光效方法）；中國能效標識等級與埃及能效等級的推導方式不同，無法直接轉換。請確認具體燈具類型是否落入現行埃及能效標籤標準的覆蓋範圍，以及 EOS 接受哪些實驗室檢測報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (where in scope) — Egyptian appliance energy-efficiency label required for covered lighting products; confirm scope and class under the current EOS ES energy-label standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (where in scope) — China Energy Label and CEL filing required for covered LED lamps under GB 30255

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt requires a national appliance energy-efficiency label for covered lighting products, administered by EOS — a separate scheme from China's GB 30255 China Energy Label. The two labels are not interchangeable; a CN-registered product must obtain the Egyptian classification and label format. Verify the exact covered scope, efficiency classes, and accepted test reports against the current EOS energy-label standard before placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及要求被覆盖的照明产品贴附由 EOS 管理的国家家电能效标签——这是与中国 GB 30255 中国能效标识不同的独立制度。两种标签不可互换；在中国注册的产品须取得埃及等级及标签格式。投放前请对照现行 EOS 能效标签标准核实确切覆盖范围、能效等级及接受的检测报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及要求被覆蓋的照明產品貼附由 EOS 管理的國家家電能效標籤——這是與中國 GB 30255 中國能效標識不同的獨立制度。兩種標籤不可互換；在中國注冊的產品須取得埃及等級及標籤格式。投放前請對照現行 EOS 能效標籤標準核實確切覆蓋範圍、能效等級及接受的檢測報告。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Performance and Efficacy Substantiation (lm/W, power factor) vs CN GB 30255
requirement_topic.zh: 能效表现与光效实证（lm/W、功率因数）vs 中国 GB 30255
requirement_topic.zht: 能效表現與光效實證（lm/W、功率因數）vs 中國 GB 30255

summary.en: Beyond carrying the label, lighting products entering Egypt must substantiate their declared energy performance — luminous efficacy (lm/W), rated power, luminous flux, and where applicable power factor — using test reports acceptable to EOS under the relevant ES standards that adopt IEC/ISO photometric and electrical measurement methods. The declared efficiency class on the Egyptian label must be supported by these test reports. Where the Egyptian energy-label standard sets minimum allowable efficacy values for a product category, products below the minimum are not eligible for that market segment. Importers should expect EOS-accepted laboratory testing (or recognised equivalents) as the basis for the declared class.
summary.zh: 除贴附标签外，进入埃及的照明产品须依据采纳 IEC/ISO 光度学及电气测量方法的相关 ES 标准，使用 EOS 接受的检测报告实证其声明的能效表现——光效（lm/W）、额定功率、光通量及（如适用）功率因数。埃及标签上声明的能效等级须有这些检测报告支持。当埃及能效标签标准为某产品类别设定最低允许光效值时，低于最低值的产品不符合该市场细分的资格。进口商应预期以 EOS 接受的实验室检测（或认可的等效检测）作为声明等级的依据。
summary.zht: 除貼附標籤外，進入埃及的照明產品須依據採納 IEC/ISO 光度學及電氣測量方法的相關 ES 標準，使用 EOS 接受的檢測報告實證其聲明的能效表現——光效（lm/W）、額定功率、光通量及（如適用）功率因數。埃及標籤上聲明的能效等級須有這些檢測報告支持。當埃及能效標籤標準為某產品類別設定最低允許光效值時，低於最低值的產品不符合該市場細分的資格。進口商應預期以 EOS 接受的實驗室檢測（或認可的等效檢測）作為聲明等級的依據。

standards_or_laws: EOS ES energy-performance/labelling standard for LED lamps and luminaires — adopting IEC/ISO photometric and electrical test methods (verify current ES number)
IEC photometric test methods (e.g. IEC/ISO measurement of luminous flux and efficacy) as adopted by the relevant ES standard

summary.en: In China, the minimum allowable efficacy values and efficiency grades for general-lighting LED lamps are set by GB 30255, with photometric and electrical performance measured per the associated GB/T test-method standards (e.g. GB/T 24823 for performance requirements of LED lamps and related GB/T photometric methods). Power factor and luminous efficacy are core declared parameters underpinning the China Energy Label grade. Products must meet at least the GB 30255 minimum allowable value to be lawfully sold, and the declared grade is filed in the CEL system with supporting test data.
summary.zh: 在中国，普通照明用 LED 灯的最低允许光效值及能效等级由 GB 30255 规定，光度学与电气性能依据相关 GB/T 测试方法标准测量（如 GB/T 24823 LED 灯性能要求及相关 GB/T 光度方法）。功率因数与光效是支撑中国能效标识等级的核心声明参数。产品须至少满足 GB 30255 最低允许值方可合法销售，声明等级连同支持性检测数据在 CEL 系统备案。
summary.zht: 在中國，普通照明用 LED 燈的最低允許光效值及能效等級由 GB 30255 規定，光度學與電氣性能依據相關 GB/T 測試方法標準測量（如 GB/T 24823 LED 燈性能要求及相關 GB/T 光度方法）。功率因數與光效是支撐中國能效標識等級的核心聲明參數。產品須至少滿足 GB 30255 最低允許值方可合法銷售，聲明等級連同支持性檢測數據在 CEL 系統備案。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED lamps (China)
GB/T 24823 — Performance requirements of LED lamps for general lighting service (China) and associated GB/T photometric test methods

gap.en: The performance parameters are conceptually similar (lm/W efficacy, power factor, luminous flux), but the accepting authority and the reference standard differ. China test data filed under GB 30255 / GB/T methods is not automatically accepted by EOS — the Egyptian declared class must be substantiated against the ES standard's adopted IEC/ISO methods and via EOS-accepted laboratories or recognised equivalents. A product that meets the GB 30255 minimum may map to a different efficiency class on the Egyptian scale because the class boundaries are defined independently. Manufacturers should obtain test reports referencing the IEC/ISO methods as adopted by Egypt and confirm acceptable laboratory accreditation with the importer before relying on existing CN reports.
gap.zh: 性能参数在概念上相似（lm/W 光效、功率因数、光通量），但受理机构与参照标准不同。依据 GB 30255/GB/T 方法备案的中国检测数据不会被 EOS 自动接受——埃及声明等级须对照 ES 标准采纳的 IEC/ISO 方法、并通过 EOS 接受的实验室或认可的等效途径实证。满足 GB 30255 最低值的产品在埃及标尺上可能对应不同的能效等级，因为等级界限是独立定义的。制造商应取得引用埃及所采纳 IEC/ISO 方法的检测报告，并在依赖现有中国报告前与进口商确认可接受的实验室认可资质。
gap.zht: 性能參數在概念上相似（lm/W 光效、功率因數、光通量），但受理機構與參照標準不同。依據 GB 30255/GB/T 方法備案的中國檢測數據不會被 EOS 自動接受——埃及聲明等級須對照 ES 標準採納的 IEC/ISO 方法、並通過 EOS 接受的實驗室或認可的等效途徑實證。滿足 GB 30255 最低值的產品在埃及標尺上可能對應不同的能效等級，因為等級界限是獨立定義的。製造商應取得引用埃及所採納 IEC/ISO 方法的檢測報告，並在依賴現有中國報告前與進口商確認可接受的實驗室認可資質。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (where in scope) — declared efficiency class must be substantiated by EOS-accepted test reports under the relevant ES standard adopting IEC/ISO methods
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 30255 minimum allowable efficacy values and CEL-filed test data required for general-lighting LED lamps

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt and China both regulate LED energy performance (efficacy lm/W, power factor), but Egypt substantiates the declared label class against ES standards adopting IEC/ISO methods, not GB 30255. CN test data is not automatically accepted by EOS; class boundaries differ, so a GB-compliant product may map to a different Egyptian class. Obtain IEC/ISO-referenced test reports and confirm EOS-accepted laboratory accreditation before relying on existing CN reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及与中国都对 LED 能效（光效 lm/W、功率因数）进行监管，但埃及依据采纳 IEC/ISO 方法的 ES 标准实证声明的标签等级，而非 GB 30255。中国检测数据不会被 EOS 自动接受；等级界限不同，因此符合 GB 标准的产品可能对应不同的埃及等级。在依赖现有中国报告前，请取得引用 IEC/ISO 的检测报告并确认 EOS 接受的实验室认可资质。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及與中國都對 LED 能效（光效 lm/W、功率因數）進行監管，但埃及依據採納 IEC/ISO 方法的 ES 標準實證聲明的標籤等級，而非 GB 30255。中國檢測數據不會被 EOS 自動接受；等級界限不同，因此符合 GB 標準的產品可能對應不同的埃及等級。在依賴現有中國報告前，請取得引用 IEC/ISO 的檢測報告並確認 EOS 接受的實驗室認可資質。
